ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

Language: typescript
TencentDB Agent Memory delivers fully local long-term memory for AI Agents via a 4-tier progressive pipeline, with zero external API dependencies.

JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: garrytan/gstack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/garrytan/gstack
Language: typescript
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-labs-code/design.md
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-labs-code/design.md
Language: typescript
A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hoangsonww/Claude-Code-Agent-Monitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hoangsonww/Claude-Code-Agent-Monitor
Language: typescript
🚀 A real-time monitoring dashboard for Claude Code, built with SQLite3, Node.js, Express, React, Vite, TailwindCSS, and WebSockets. It tracks sessions, agent activity, tool usage, and subagent orchestration, providing live analytics, a Kanban status board, status notifications, a cute buddy, and an interactive web UI/MacOS/Windows native app.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jamiepine/voicebox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jamiepine/voicebox
Language: typescript
The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mauriceboe/TREK
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mauriceboe/TREK
Language: typescript
A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/playwright
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Playwright is a framework for Web Testing and Automation. It allows testing Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API.
